description: Fix Dev Agent Login Redirect Port - Validate that dev:agent script correctly sets NEXTAUTH_URL so login redirects to port 3080 instead of 3000

userStories.title: Verify dev:agent script sets NEXTAUTH_URL to port 3080
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to confirm that the dev:agent npm script injects NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3080 so NextAuth redirects to the correct port.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json dev:agent script contains 'NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3080 next dev -p 3080'
Run 'npm run dev:agent' from gitstat-app/ and confirm the server starts on port 3080
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill: navigate to http://localhost:3080 and confirm the page loads
userStories.notes: Verified: script already correct, server starts on 3080, browser loads, typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify Dev Agent Login redirects to port 3080
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to confirm that clicking 'Dev Agent Login' on the login page redirects to http://localhost:3080/dashboard, not port 3000.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using agent-browser skill: navigate to http://localhost:3080/login
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill: the 'Dev Agent Login' button is visible on the login page
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill: click 'Dev Agent Login' button and confirm redirect lands on http://localhost:3080/dashboard (URL bar shows port 3080, not 3000)
No network errors or failed redirects in browser console
userStories.notes: Fixed: added NEXTAUTH_SECRET fallback to dev:agent script. Verified browser redirect lands on http://localhost:3080/dashboard

userStories.title: Verify .example.env has port alignment comment
userStories.description: As a developer, I need documentation in .example.env that explains NEXTAUTH_URL must match the dev server port.
acceptanceCriteria: .example.env contains a comment mentioning port 3000 for 'npm run dev' and port 3080 for 'npm run dev:agent'

userStories.title: Verify README documents port/NEXTAUTH_URL relationship
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the README to mention port 3080 for dev:agent so new contributors configure OAuth correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md OAuth callback URL section mentions port 3080 for dev:agent
README.md NEXTAUTH_URL example includes comment about matching dev server port
